metadata.description: Use Google Antigravity (the agy CLI, powered by Gemini 3.5) from inside Claude Code, with codex-plugin-cc parity: delegate, review, adversarial-review, an opt-in stop-review-gate, --model and --wait. Fork of Idun-Group/antigravity-plugin-cc.

plugins.name: antigravity
plugins.description: Delegate to and review with Google's Antigravity CLI (agy / Gemini 3.5) without leaving Claude Code — codex-parity fork (adversarial-review, stop-review-gate, --model, --wait).
